retry_reason: put operations are unconditional and always succeed; retrying would cause double-release (use-after-free).
contract_summary: Releases one reference on the given airoha_ppe_dev's associated device (eth->dev) and releases the module reference on THIS_MODULE. After this call, the caller must not access the device's resources (e.g., the dev pointer) as the reference count has been decremented. The function is the put-side counterpart to a previous get (e.g., from airoha_ppe_get_dev or similar). It is unconditional and does not return any error; the caller should not retry and must ensure the references were previously acquired.
